issue_title: BUG: Large webpack stats bundles cause socket.io client disconnect.
issue_body_preview: After upgrading to webpack@4 and webpack-dashboard@3.0.2 I'm able to get a full `Success` notification as well as Modules/Assets/Problems display. However, when also updating babel to @7, jest to @24, and storybook to @5 (I think only really babel is related, but for completeness) I'm able to build
test_description_zh: 在使用 webpack-dashboard 时，配置一个较大的 webpack 构建项目（例如包含大量模块和依赖），启动 webpack-dev-server 并观察 webpack-dashboard 终端界面是否能完整显示 Modules、Assets、Problems 等所有面板数据。
expected_result_zh: webpack-dashboard 应能完整接收并显示所有构建统计信息，包括 Modules、Assets、Problems 等面板数据均正常渲染，不会因为构建包过大导致 socket.io 客户端断开连接而出现数据丢失或面板空白的情况。
